name: Identified WeaveScope Management Tool Running
description: WeaveScope is a legitimate tool used for monitoring Docker and Kubernetes deployments. However, we have observed threat actors abusing the tool to remotely control compromised hosts.

filterSets.name: Identified Suspicious Use Of Namespace Wrapper
Identified Outbound Probe To WeaveScope Instance
Identified WeaveScope Running On Linux Hosts

author: Nitesh Surana
